Uses of Class
io.goobi.viewer.model.security.PagePermissions

Packages that use PagePermissions
Package
Description
io.goobi.viewer.model.security
Provides the core access-control domain model for the Goobi viewer, including license types, access permissions, privilege holders, copyright indicators, and security questions.

  • Uses of PagePermissions in io.goobi.viewer.model.security

    Fields in io.goobi.viewer.model.security declared as PagePermissions
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final PagePermissions
    PagePermissions.EMPTY
    Sentinel instance representing the absence of pre-fetched permissions.
    Methods in io.goobi.viewer.model.security that return PagePermissions
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static PagePermissions
    AccessConditionUtils.fetchPagePermissions(String pi, HttpServletRequest request)
    Fetches and pre-evaluates access permissions for all pages of a record in a single batch Solr query, avoiding O(n) per-page Solr queries during IIIF manifest generation.
